tools.name: search_linkedin_employees
tools.description: Find employees at a company on LinkedIn. Returns name, headline, location, and profile URL. Uses Google indexing — no LinkedIn login or cookies required.

tools.name: search_linkedin_jobs
tools.description: Search LinkedIn job listings by keyword and location. Returns job title, company, location, seniority, and applicant count. No login required.

tools.name: search_linkedin_posts
tools.description: Search LinkedIn posts by keyword. Returns post snippet, author name, headline, and profile URL. Uses Google indexing — no LinkedIn login required.

tools.name: find_b2b_leads
tools.description: Find B2B leads for target companies: LinkedIn profiles, job titles, and guessed business emails. Apollo and ZoomInfo alternative. No API key required.

tools.name: scrape_reddit
tools.description: Scrape Reddit posts and comments by subreddit, keyword search, or post URL. Returns full post data with comment trees.

tools.name: scrape_ats_jobs
tools.description: Scrape job listings from company ATS boards: Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, and Ashby. No auth required — uses their public job APIs.

tools.name: search_google_trends
tools.description: Get Google Trends interest data for up to 5 keywords. Returns interest over time, geographic breakdown, and related queries.

tools.name: search_sec_filings
tools.description: Full-text search across SEC EDGAR filings: 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and more. Returns filing metadata and matched text excerpts.

tools.name: search_indiamart_suppliers
tools.description: Search IndiaMART for B2B suppliers and manufacturers in India. Returns company name, products, location, contact details, and ratings.

tools.name: search_naukri_jobs
tools.description: Search Naukri.com for job listings in India. Returns job title, company, location, salary range, experience required, and description.

tools.name: search_pubmed
tools.description: Search PubMed for biomedical literature. Returns PMID, title, abstract, authors, journal, and DOI. 36M+ articles indexed.

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search arXiv preprints by keyword or category. Returns title, abstract, authors, and PDF link. Best for AI, CS, physics, and biology research.

tools.name: search_nih_grants
tools.description: Search NIH RePORTER for grant awards by topic, agency, or institution. Returns project title, abstract, award amount, PI names, and institution.

tools.name: scrape_trustpilot
tools.description: Scrape Trustpilot reviews for any company. Returns reviewer name, star rating, review title, body, date, and verified status.

tools.name: find_website_contacts
tools.description: Crawl a list of domains and extract business emails, phone numbers, and social profile links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube) from homepages, contact and about pages. No API key required.

tools.name: verify_emails
tools.description: Bulk-verify email addresses: syntax, MX records, SMTP deliverability, disposable-domain and role-based detection. Use before sending outreach so you only contact addresses that actually exist.

tools.name: find_linkedin_candidates
tools.description: Recruiter sourcing: find LinkedIn profiles matching a role, skills, location, experience band, and optional target companies. Returns name, headline, current title/company, profile URL, matched skills, and a match-confidence score. No login required.

tools.name: get_linkedin_profiles
tools.description: Fetch full LinkedIn profile details by profile URL: experience, education, skills, headline, and location. No login or cookies required.

tools.name: get_linkedin_company
tools.description: Get LinkedIn company details: employee count, industry, website, follower count, headquarters, and description. Accepts LinkedIn company URLs, or plain company names (resolved best-effort to a linkedin.com/company slug).

tools.name: search_google_maps
tools.description: Search Google Maps business listings by keyword and location. Returns name, category, address, phone, website, rating, review count, opening hours, and coordinates. No login, no Google Maps API key.

tools.name: search_crunchbase
tools.description: Look up company funding and firmographic data on Crunchbase: total funding, last round, investors, founding year, employee range, and category. Use to check whether a company is actually growing.

tools.name: analyze_github_repos
tools.description: Deep metadata for public GitHub repositories: stars, forks, language breakdown, topics, license, README content, contributor count, latest release, and commit recency. Use to see what a company or project is actually building. No GitHub token required.

tools.name: lookup_lei
tools.description: Look up a company Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) in the official GLEIF registry by legal name. Returns LEI code, registration status, legal address, and entity status. Authoritative source for verifying a company legally exists.

tools.name: resolve_company_identity
tools.description: Resolve a company name to its authoritative identifiers across registries in one call: GLEIF LEI, legal name, country, entity status, and SEC EDGAR CIK plus last filing date. Use to ground company facts before trusting them.

tools.name: search_zillow
tools.description: Search Zillow for-sale or rental listings by city, ZIP, or neighborhood. Returns price, beds, baths, sqft, address, coordinates, and listing URL. No API key.

tools.name: get_zillow_property_details
tools.description: Fetch deep Zillow property data from listing URLs or ZPIDs: price history, tax history, school ratings, HOA fee, year built, Zestimate, rent Zestimate, and photos. Chains off search_zillow output.

tools.name: search_redfin
tools.description: Search Redfin for-sale or recently-sold listings by city, ZIP, or Redfin URL. Returns price, beds, baths, sqft, price per sqft, listing agent, broker, MLS ID, and listing URL. Use soldWithinDays for comparable-sales analysis.

tools.name: search_realtor
tools.description: Search Realtor.com for-sale or sold listings by city or ZIP. Returns price, beds, baths, sqft, county, listing status, and the listing agent and brokerage office for every record. No MLS login.

tools.name: get_run_results
tools.description: Collect the results of a previously started actor run. Use this when another tool returned status "pending" with a run_id: wait a few seconds, then call this with that run_id. Repeat until it returns results.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "search_linkedin_employees" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Find employees at a company on LinkedIn. Returns name, headline, location, and profile URL. Uses Google indexing — no LinkedIn login or cookies required.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_linkedin_profiles" references sensitive artifacts (cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Fetch full LinkedIn profile details by profile URL: experience, education, skills, headline, and location. No login or cookies required.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_linkedin_employees, search_linkedin_posts, scrape_reddit, scrape_trustpilot, find_website_contacts, get_linkedin_profiles, get_linkedin_company, search_google_maps, search_zillow, get_zillow_property_details, search_redfin · Private data: find_b2b_leads, search_indiamart_suppliers, find_website_contacts, verify_emails, search_google_maps, analyze_github_repos, search_zillow, search_realtor · Public sink: search_linkedin_posts, scrape_reddit, verify_emails · Destructive: get_run_results.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_linkedin_employees, search_linkedin_posts, scrape_reddit, scrape_trustpilot, find_website_contacts, get_linkedin_profiles, get_linkedin_company, search_google_maps, search_zillow, get_zillow_property_details, search_redfin · Private data: find_b2b_leads, search_indiamart_suppliers, find_website_contacts, verify_emails, search_google_maps, analyze_github_repos, search_zillow, search_realtor · Public sink: search_linkedin_posts, scrape_reddit, verify_emails · Destructive: get_run_results

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
